name: open_spiel_wrapper
title: OpenSpiel Game Wrapper
description: A generic Kaggle environment for playing OpenSpiel games.

episodeSteps.description: Maximum number of steps (actions taken) in an episode.

actTimeout.description: Maximum runtime (seconds) to obtain an action from an agent.

openSpielGameName.description: The short_name of the OpenSpiel game to load (e.g., 'tic_tac_toe', 'chess'). This name must be registered with OpenSpiel.

openSpielGameSettings.description: Optional game-specific settings as a JSON object (string-to-string key-value pairs), passed to pyspiel.load_game(name, params). Example: {"board_size": "19"} for Go.

reward.description: Reward for the agent. Interpretation depends on the OpenSpiel game (e.g., for zero-sum games: 1 for win, -1 for loss, 0 for draw/ongoing). The interpreter will provide the agent's specific reward.

openSpielGameName.description: The short_name of the OpenSpiel game being played. Useful for agents to adapt to game-specifics.

raw_observation_string.description: String representation of the OpenSpiel state (from state.to_string()). Useful for debugging or agents familiar with OpenSpiel string parsing.

observation_tensor.description: Flattened observation tensor from OpenSpiel, from the perspective of this agent (state.observation_tensor(player_id)). Length and interpretation vary by game.

legal_actions.description: List of legal action IDs for this agent if it's their turn. Empty if not their turn or if the game has ended.

current_player_id.description: The ID of the player whose turn it is in OpenSpiel (e.g., 0 or 1 for a 2-player game). All agents see this.

is_terminal.description: Boolean indicating if the OpenSpiel game has ended. All agents see this.

player_id.description: The player ID (e.g., 0, 1) assigned to this agent in the OpenSpiel game. This helps the agent identify itself.

remainingOverageTime.description: Standard Kaggle field: Total remaining banked time (seconds) for this agent.

action.description: Integer action ID to be played in the OpenSpiel game. This should be one of the values from the 'legal_actions' list in the agent's current observation.

status.description: Standard Kaggle agent status. Will be set by the interpreter based on OpenSpiel game state (e.g., 'ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE', 'DONE').
